About Henk

This stunning Friesian horse showcases a glossy black coat and powerful physique, exuding elegance and strength. Highly sought after for its gentle temperament and versatility, the Friesian is ideal for dressage, driving, and leisure riding. Make an impression with this majestic horse, prized for both its performance and beauty.
